summary: The Goshen Township Board of Zoning Appeals held its organizational meeting for 2026. The board approved previous meeting minutes, adopted the 2026 meeting schedule, elected officers for the year, and cancelled the February 9th meeting due to no pending applications.
decisions: Adopted the 2026 tentative meeting schedule (third Monday of each month)
Elected Mr. Sigla as Board of Zoning Appeals Chairperson
Elected Mr. Pruitt as Vice Chairperson (Mr. Purcell declined nomination)
Elected secretary for the board (name unclear from transcript)
Cancelled the February 9, 2026 meeting due to no pending applications
notable_topics: Election of BZA Chairperson, Vice Chairperson, and Secretary
Discussion of meeting start time (kept at 6:30 PM)
Cancellation of February 9th meeting due to no pending applications
notes: This was the Board of Zoning Appeals organizational meeting, not a Township Trustees meeting. The meeting was very brief, lasting approximately 9 minutes (6:30 PM to 6:39 PM). The BZA secretary's name was unclear in the transcript. The next scheduled meeting is March 16, 2026.
title: BZA 1-12-26
